# Optikk

> Optikk is an OpenTelemetry-native observability platform: traces, logs,
> metrics, dashboards, monitors, and LLM observability, queried through a web
> app, an HTTP API, and the `optikk` CLI. AI coding agents can drive the full
> lifecycle — signup, team onboarding, instrumentation, and issue
> investigation — through the CLI alone.

## Getting started (agents)

Install the CLI, then follow the agent guide:

    curl -fsSL https://optikk.in/install.sh | sh
    optikk agent setup --print   # the full guide for AI agents

- Agent guide: https://optikk.in/agents.md
- Machine-readable command tree: `optikk agent schema`
- Always pass `--agent`: JSON on stdout, a JSON error envelope on stderr,
  taxonomized exit codes (0 ok · 2 usage · 3 auth · 4 network · 5 api).
- Signup requires the human's explicit consent to https://optikk.in/terms —
  agents must ask before passing `--accept-terms`.

## Key flows

- Onboard: `optikk onboard --agent --email … --password … --name … --org … --accept-terms`
  → returns the ingest API key + OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_* pair → instrument →
  loop `optikk verify --agent --from 15m` until exit 0.
- Investigate: `services list` → `errors list` → `traces get` /
  `traces critical-path` → `logs trace <trace-id>` → `errors latest <group-id>`.
- Team: `optikk users add dev@example.com` (emails a set-password link).

## Links

- Web app: https://app.optikk.in
- Docs: https://docs.optikk.dev
- Support: https://optikk.in/support
